name: @ryu/approvals-app
description: The Ryu Inbox app: everything that wants a decision from the user in one place — pending HITL approvals (approve/reject), per-user notifications (read/ack the workflow-resume gate), quest task check-offs, and Shadow's proactive suggestions. Shipped as a full-page Companion (Path B, ui_format:"html"). Drives Core's /api/approvals/*, /api/notifications/*, /api/quests/* and Shadow's /proactive + /api/feedback through the approvals:crud + quests:crud bridge capabilities; built to one self-contained HTML via vite-plugin-singlefile. Consumes @ryu/ui components (tree-shaken into the single-file bundle).
